title: AI 干活就是快，写了个语音输入法
content: A PC version of the “豆包” input method has been released, but it lacks Windows support. To address this, DS V4 Flash created a single-file build that uses the same “豆包 seed” ASR model. The tool was completed in just a few minutes, demonstrating how quickly AI can develop small utilities. GitHub link: https://github.com/yu1745/voice-input

title: 开源桌面 Agent，支持 Agent 形象定制
content: LeAgent is an open‑source desktop agent that allows custom agent personas. It dynamically assembles layered system prompts using multiple context sources (personality, tool strategies, environment, active projects, user commands, history). A stable hash enables prompt caching to save tokens. The memory system divides long‑term memory into plot, semantic, and procedural types. Retrieval pipelines merge semantic and lexical recall, injecting relevant prompts while managing context size. The project supports DeepSeek APIs and includes a pet‑style avatar.

content: The article reviews minor yet useful updates in Python 3.15 that received little attention. It highlights new syntax enhancements, such as simplified pattern matching, added dialects for variable annotations, and optional tuple unpacking. The piece also covers streamlined standard‑library modules, including extended logging capabilities, better random number generators, and enhanced dataclass behaviors. Additionally, it discusses performance improvements, security fixes, and deprecation paths, noting how these refinements subtly improve code readability, safety, and efficiency.

title: 很好奇 RAG 真的是现代 ai agent 所需要的吗，还有 langchian 这种框架，没有看到太多知名开源项目用到了
content: The discussion questions whether Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and frameworks like LangChain are truly needed for modern AI agents. Some participants report limited success with RAG, especially on small datasets, noting it can add overhead and become outdated when data changes. Others suggest that larger projects might use knowledge‑graph–based RAG for better reliability. Many note that most use cases are enterprise‑internal, so RAG/LangChain appear rare publicly, with alternatives like simple text search sometimes proving more effective.

content: The author reflects on five years of holding “core assets” like Tencent and Moutai in China’s market, which yielded near‑zero returns while U.S. equity markets performed strongly. title: 为什么餐厅都在劝你去买团购券？
content: Restaurants push customers towards group‑buy coupons because online group buying turns unpredictable foot traffic into predictable sales, improving inventory control and higher table turnover. Despite higher platform fees and lower per‑transaction revenue, merchants gain broader reach and more efficient operations. The surge of multiple competing platforms (Meituan, Douyin, Taobao, JD, etc.) reflects a market where both merchants and platforms coordinate to redirect dining decisions online. The competition ultimately centers on building a seamless ecosystem that keeps users discovering, comparing, and ordering repeatedly.

title: 突发，马斯克递交史上最大IPO
content: SpaceX filed an S‑1 to launch the largest IPO ever, targeting $75 bn in funding and a $2 trillion valuation, with trading slated for June 12 under the ticker SPCX. The filing shows the company has shifted from a rocket launcher to a multi‑sector conglomerate—space launch, Starlink internet, AI, and social media—reporting $18.7 bn revenue in 2025 but a $4.9 bn loss. SpaceX claims a $28.5 trillion total addressable market, largely AI, and plans to become Elon Musk’s first trillion‑dollar‑worth billionaire following the IPO.

title: 我自己使用 gpt5.5 中转的一些发现。
content: The writer reports on using several GPT‑5.5 intermediaries. content: At Alibaba Cloud’s 2026 summit, head of MuleRun, Chen Yusen, confirmed MuleRun is a core Alibaba agent product that integrates Alibaba Cloud infrastructure and AI services. He noted a 10‑fold efficiency gap between the AI Native and Copilot teams, and that enterprises have only about an 18‑month window to shift from a 20% AI/80% human “Copilot” model to an 80% AI/20% human “AI Native” model. Mobility relies on AI becoming the workflow backbone, with agents passing context, invoking tools, and running long‑term.

title: 为什么澳大利亚人对国内最大的连锁超市感到厌倦
content: Australia’s most popular supermarket chains are increasingly criticized for their prices, limited product variety, and perceived lack of innovation. Consumers report long checkout lines, insufficient organic and fresh options, and a growing preference for online shopping and local specialty stores. As competition rises and cost of living pressures intensify, shoppers seek retailers that offer better value, convenience, and healthier choices, leading to growing dissatisfaction with the major chains.

title: 笔记软件感悟，知识复利才是核心
content: The author chose Obsidian because of its macOS/iOS/iCloud sync, AI-friendly Markdown format, and local readability. They emphasize that the software itself is unimportant; the real value lies in the content and its ability to accumulate knowledge over time. Notes should be reviewed regularly to turn information into personal insight, enabling further connections across topics. Obsidian’s graph view helps link related concepts, fostering a personal knowledge network. The key takeaway: focus on knowledge replication, not the tool.

title: 如何看待 OpenAI 宣布AI 证明困扰人类 80 年的单位距离问题？证明可信度如何？
content: OpenAI’s GPT model independently solved the long‑standing planar unit‑distance problem, disproving a 1946 conjecture by Paul Erdős. The proof, verified by external mathematicians, used advanced algebraic number‑theory tools—such as infinite class field towers and Golod‑Shafarevich theory—not traditional geometry. The achievement demonstrates that general‑purpose AI can generate novel, coherent mathematical insights without task‑specific training, hinting at broader applications across scientific disciplines while underscoring the continued need for human judgment.

title: 利润缩水1600亿，日本七大车企陷入至暗时刻
content: Japanese automakers Toyota, Honda, Nissan, Suzuki, Mazda, Subaru, and Mitsubishi are expected to see a 48 % drop in total net profit for fiscal 2026 (April 2026‑March 2027), falling from 7.54 trillion yen in fiscal 2023 to about 3.9 trillion yen. The decline reflects ongoing 2025 losses—Honda’s first loss in 70 years, Nissan’s continuing deficits, and sharp profit declines for the other firms. Companies are tightening strategies, speeding hybrid delivery, cutting electric‑vehicle plans, and focusing on cost cuts and supply‑chain efficiencies to recover profits.

content: A Chinese AI startup, led by former ByteDance exec Wang Changhu, raised 2.5 billion yuan in six months. Its “PixVerse” models generate high‑quality videos, reaching 4K resolution and improving over iterations. The company emphasizes efficient development, using only a fraction of competitors’ resources. It plans dual strategies: consumer “make‑your‑own‑video” tools and enterprise industry models. Partnerships with TV and marketing firms aim to scale its AI video solutions beyond casual creators to professional content production.

title: 小鹏最强SUV上市，价格太残暴
content: Xpeng’s first full‑size SUV, the GX, launches at 269,800 yuan, down from a pre‑sale of 399,000 yuan. It offers pure electric and range‑extended power, with prices between 279,800 and 359,800 yuan. The vehicle features a 5,265 mm long chassis, 6‑seat layout, luxurious interior with Nappa leather, multiple screens, zero‑gravity seats, a 33‑speaker system, and advanced noise isolation. Notable highlights include Xpeng’s first self‑driven Robotaxi platform, extensive passive and active safety systems, and a powerful two‑motor drivetrain. The GX aims to revive sales and elevate Xpeng’s premium brand image.

content: AI data labeling is shifting from repetitive “electronic factory” work to high‑skill “data alchemists” roles in top tech firms. New positions—often named “AI question experts” or “data alchemists”—require master's degrees and domain expertise (finance, law, medicine, linguistics), offering hourly rates of 500–800 ¥ and monthly salaries of 8–10 k ¥. These roles focus on training large models through expert feedback and nuanced labeling, but experience varies from rewarding specialist tasks to monotonous, low‑pay pipeline jobs.

title: 重磅！刚刚OpenAI宣布通用模型解决困扰人类80年的单位距离问题，彻底震惊整个数学界 | 原文
content: OpenAI’s latest generative model has reportedly solved the Plane Unit‑Distance Problem, an 80‑year‑old question posed by Paul Erdős. The model produced the solution independently, without any tailored training or problem‑specific system. The problem asks for the maximum number of point pairs at exactly unit distance in a planar configuration. The achievement was unexpected even to mathematicians and marks a significant breakthrough in applying AI to longstanding open mathematical challenges.

title: 苹果新任首席硬件官启动重组，加速产品研发与芯片整合
content: Apple’s new chief hardware officer, Johnny Srug, has launched a second team reorganisation to accelerate product development and chip integration. The reshuffle realigns responsibilities for product design, hardware engineering, and core technology teams. Former design lead Kate Bayerlon’s duties are split between two deputies while she oversees reliability and material teams; Tom Marib now heads hardware engineering. Two senior executives will report directly to Srug under the new Apple CEO. Zongjian Chen’s authority expands to include battery, camera, sensor software, and Apple Watch blood‑glucose projects.

title: Meta 准备裁员 10% 公司将扁平化管理层级
content: Meta Platforms will cut about 10% of its workforce, roughly 7,000 employees, and reassign them to AI projects. The company will also flatten its management structure. This follows a large 2025 layoff and is part of a cost‑cutting, AI‑focused reorganization. Employees learned about the changes at 4 a.m. local time. Zuckerberg is directing resources toward AI and the metaverse.

content: H&H International Investment increased its quarterly portfolio to $20.004 billion, adding five new holdings and emphasising core positions and emerging sectors. title: 阿里云峰会：发布「真武 M890」AI 芯片、千问旗舰模型 Qwen3.7-Max 上线
content: Alibaba unveiled its AI stack at the yearly cloud summit: the self‑made “Zhenwu M890” AI chip, a 128‑core super‑node server, and the flagship model Qwen3.7‑Max. The M890, developed by Pingtouge, offers three times the performance of its predecessor and fits into a roadmap that includes the V900 in 2027 and J900 in 2028. Qwen3.7‑Max tops domestic model benchmarks, can handle long‑run tasks, and will soon be API‑accessible via Alibaba Cloud. The launch reflects Alibaba’s push for enterprise‑grade agents and independent AI infrastructure.

title: Investigating unauthorized access to GitHub-owned repositories
content: On May 18, a malware‑laden VS Code extension compromised an employee’s device, leading GitHub to remove the extension, isolate the endpoint, and launch an investigation. The breach caused exfiltration of about 3,800 GitHub‑internal repositories. No evidence shows impact to customer data stored outside GitHub. Critical secrets were rotated promptly; logs are being analyzed and infrastructure monitored for further activity. A full report will be released after the investigation concludes.

title: 电池技术的突破很快就能让电池变得更好
content: Breakthroughs in battery technology are poised to greatly improve performance, offering higher energy density, faster charging, and longer lifespan. These developments could enable more efficient electric vehicles, extended use for portable electronics, and better integration of renewable energy into the grid. Continued research and investment are expected to accelerate the adoption of advanced batteries, potentially reshaping many sectors that depend on reliable energy storage.

title: 中国如何在乌克兰悄悄帮助俄罗斯
content: China is providing subtler support to Russia amid its Ukraine conflict. Through diplomatic channels, China maintains an open line of communication with Russian leaders and avoids public condemnation of Russia’s actions. Economically, China continues trade ties, particularly in energy and technology, offering Russia access to Chinese markets and alternative suppliers. Politically, China encourages a negotiated settlement and refrains from imposing sanctions, positioning itself as a pragmatic mediator while protecting its strategic interests.
